<?php namespace Faker\Provider\de_AT; class PhoneNumber extends \Faker\Provider\PhoneNumber { protected static $formats = [ '0650 #######', '0660 #######', '0664 #######', '0676 #######', '0677 #######', '0678 #######', '0699 #######', '0680 #######', '+43 #### ####', '+43 #### ####-##', ]; protected static $e164Formats = [ '+43##########', ]; }
